dialogues: Wait. Look at what those symbols were hiding.
4 symbols. Each symbol held 5 items. That's 4 groups of 5. Look familiar? This is called multiplication. You've been doing multiplication this whole time.
Right. 4 groups. And remember? 5 in each group. That's 4 groups of 5. And guess what? There's a symbol for that: 4 × 5.
